name: The Train Station
short_description: As a Stationmaster of a sleepy English station, it is your duty to carry out the nightly tasks and tend to the customers, but can the customers be trusted?
detailed_description:
The Train Station is a short horror game developed by one person. Play as a stationmaster on a foggy night in 1940s England. Carry out essential tasks such as collecting lost luggage and cleaning toilets, but remember to attend the ticket booth when you hear the bell.

Key Features

•Immersion
An atmospheric first person experience which draws you into the environment and story.

•Unique Setting
The game takes place in a quaint English train station.

•Short and Sweet
With a playtime of around 25-30 minutes, the experience is refined and can be played in one sitting.
